popularStory.headline: Ada De Warenne de Huntingdon
popularStory.description:
Birth: 	1120
Surrey, England
Death: 	1178
Huntingdonshire, England



Ada de Warenne (or Adeline de Varenne) was the Anglo-Norman wife of Henry of Scotland, Earl of Northumbria and Earl of Hunt …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Warenne於1120年出生在英國素可列維斯時，她的父親William de Warenne II40歲，母親Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois39歲。她於1139年與Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1178年12月6日在蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾凱爾索。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Warenne was born in 1120, in Lewes, Sussex, England, her father, William de Warenne II, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, was 39. She married Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria in 1139. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 December 1178, in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 58, and was buried in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Warenne est née en 1120, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria en 1139. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1178, à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Kelso, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Warenne 1120 in Lewes, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne II 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois 39. Sie hat 1139 Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1178 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland und wurde in Kelso, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Warenne è nata il nel 1120 nel Lewes, Sussex, England, sua padre, William de Warenne II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria nel 1139. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 dicembre 1178, nel Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Warenneが1120年にイギリススセックスルスで生まれた時，父William de Warenne IIは40歳，母Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisは39歳であった。1139年にHenry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1178年12月6日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソで58歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアケルソにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Warenne(이)가 1120년 영국 수세스 루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1139년 Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 12월 6일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 켈소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Warenne nasceu em 1120, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria em 1139. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1178, em Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Kelso, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Warenne родилась в 1120 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Warenne II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria в 1139 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 декабря 1178 г. в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности келсо, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1139 to 1152: mai le 1139 e o'o I le 1152

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada de Warenne nació en 1120, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Warenne II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Henry of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Northumbria en 1139. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1178, en Kelso, Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Kelso, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
